name: Breast of Veal Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. UNROLL PANCETTA and chop into 1/4-inch pieces.
2. PLACE the pancetta in a skillet with olive oil over medium heat, cook for 2 minutes.
3. ADD onion and garlic to the skillet, stirring occasionally, for another 2 minutes.
4. ADD lentils, rice, and chicken broth to the skillet.
5. TURN the heat to low and cover the skillet. SIMMER until all the broth is absorbed, about 30 minutes.
6. REMOVE from heat and SCOOP the contents of the skillet into a work bowl.
7. ADD chopped fresh sage, salt, and pepper.
